name: Achichi @Ignister
name_jp: アチチ<ruby lang="jp"><rb>＠</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>アット</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>イグニスター
desc: If this card is Normal or Special Summoned: You can add 1 Level 4 or lower "@Ignister" monster from your Deck to your hand, except "Achichi @Ignister". At the start of the Damage Step, when your Cyberse monster battles: You can banish this card from your GY; destroy that monster you control. You can only use each effect of "Achichi @Ignister" once per turn.
mnst_eff: If this card is Normal or Special Summoned: You can add 1 Level 4 or lower "@Ignister" monster from your Deck to your hand, except "Achichi @Ignister". At the start of the Damage Step, when your Cyberse monster battles: You can banish this card from your GY; destroy that monster you control. You can only use each effect of "Achichi @Ignister" once per turn.
eff: If this card is Normal or Special Summoned: You can add 1 Level 4 or lower "@Ignister" monster from your Deck to your hand, except "Achichi @Ignister". At the start of the Damage Step, when your Cyberse monster battles: You can banish this card from your GY; destroy that monster you control. You can only use each effect of "Achichi @Ignister" once per turn.

mst: Destroys battling monster at the start of the Damage Step
banished: Banishes itself from Graveyard for cost
